name: jan
description: Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer.
summaryZh: Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer. 这是偏模型能力或模型封装的项目，适合作为能力底座持续观察。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合在持续跟踪 AI 开源趋势时作为重点观察对象。
